name: PAD - Comprehensive Provider Query (DX + Meds)
description: Simulates a vascular medicine specialist identifying their complete PAD patient population. Combines: PAD diagnosis codes (multi-form) and medications (cilostazol/pentoxifylline + antiplatelets + statin). No labs path — ABI is recorded as bedside vital sign rather than as a standard FHIR Observation in our Synthea pipeline.
prompt:
I need to identify my complete peripheral arterial disease patient population for a quality improvement initiative on antiplatelet adherence and claudication management. From clinical experience, PAD patients are documented in different ways: most have a formal PAD diagnosis (PAD, peripheral vascular disease, intermittent claudication, or diabetic peripheral angiopathy), and most are on PAD medications (cilostazol or pentoxifylline for claudication, antiplatelets, statins).

Please run multiple FHIR queries to capture the full population:
1. Patients with any PAD diagnosis
2. Patients prescribed PAD medications (cilostazol, pentoxifylline, aspirin, clopidogrel, atorvastatin)

For each query, return the matching resources. I want the union of all patients found.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Union of PAD dx + medication Rx. Tests Condition + MedicationRequest cross-resource union for peripheral vascular disease.

required_codes.display: Peripheral vascular disorder due to DM
